question: FOG / grease-trap & grease-interceptor pretreatment regulations and TCEQ grease-trap-waste transporter requirements for a Texas-focused waste-hauling software product (2026): Houston ordinance citation + pump-out thresholds; per-municipality maintenance rules for Houston/Dallas/San Antonio(SAWS)/Austin; and TCEQ transporter registration + trip-ticket/manifest data-model requirements.
